segments.text: Up B against him, reading the hitbox, 101%—no way, they're winning!
segments.original_text: に対しての上必殺 判定出し回避見てる 101%効きいやー勝ってかっ

full_text: Up B against him, reading the hitbox, 101%—no way, they're winning!

corrections.original: に対しての上必殺判定だし回避見てる100 1%を書きいやーかってかっ
